name: Payment Reminder Sequence
description: Send escalating payment reminders for overdue invoices: 7 days overdue, 14 days overdue, and 30 days overdue with escalation to collections team.
author: platform

config.sql: SELECT id, customer_email, customer_name, amount, due_date, CURRENT_DATE - due_date AS days_overdue FROM invoices WHERE status = 'unpaid' AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE - due_date IN (7, 14, 30)

config.subject: Payment Reminder: Invoice overdue by {{$item.value.days_overdue}} days
config.html:
Payment Reminder

Dear {{$item.value.customer_name}}, your invoice for ${{$item.value.amount}} was due on {{$item.value.due_date}} and is now {{$item.value.days_overdue}} days overdue.

Please pay now to avoid service interruption.
